content.rendered:
Refund Policy

At Ratinge.com, we strive to provide the best possible experience for our users. We understand that circumstances may change, and we’ve designed our refund policy to be fair and transparent. Please read this policy carefully to understand our procedures regarding refunds.

Trial Period

We offer a trial period for new users to experience our services. During this trial period, you can explore our features without any financial commitment. If you decide to upgrade to a paid plan after the trial, you will be charged according to the plan you select.

Paid Subscriptions

Once you’ve upgraded to a paid subscription, the following refund policy applies:

**14-Day Money-Back Guarantee**

We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee for all new paid subscriptions. If you’re not satisfied with our service within the first 14 days of your paid subscription, you can request a full refund.

**Refund Eligibility**

– Refund requests must be submitted within 14 days of the initial purchase date.
– Only first-time purchases of paid subscriptions are eligible for a refund.
– Refunds are not available for renewal payments or subsequent subscription periods.

**Partial Refunds**

We do not offer partial refunds for unused portions of a subscription period after the initial 14-day window.

How to Request a Refund

To request a refund:

1. Contact our customer support team at support@ratinge.com.
2. Provide your account information and the reason for your refund request.
3. Our team will review your request and process it within 5-7 business days.

Refund Processing

– Approved refunds will be issued to the original payment method used for the purchase.
– Please allow 5-10 business days for the refund to appear on your statement, depending on your payment provider.

 Cancellation Policy

You may cancel your subscription at any time. However, cancellation does not automatically qualify you for a refund outside of the 14-day money-back guarantee period.

Exceptions

We reserve the right to deny refund requests in cases of:

– Suspected fraud or abuse of our refund policy
– Violation of our Terms of Service
– Repeated refund requests from the same user

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Refund Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page, and the “Last Updated” date at the bottom of this policy will be revised accordingly.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about our Refund Policy, please contact us at support@ratinge.com.

Last Updated: November 1, 2024

This refund policy provides clear guidelines for your users while protecting your business interests. It emphasizes the trial period, outlines the conditions for refunds, and sets expectations for the refund process. Remember to adjust any specific details to match your exact business practices and consult with a legal professional to ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

 

Thank You for Your Understanding
